sql_array: CREATE TABLE uptime_test (id UInt32, server_uptime UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO uptime_test (id, server_uptime) VALUES (1, uptime());
UPDATE uptime_test SET server_uptime = uptime() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, server_uptime, uptime() AS current_uptime FROM uptime_test;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uptime_test WHERE server_uptime < uptime();
